Implements Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) client operations, logging, connection management, advertising, scanning, GATT operations, and device discovery for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[kernel_le_client](kernel_le_client/README.md)**: Implements BLE client operations, including AMS, ANCS, app launch, DIS, PPoGATT, and test services.

## Files
- **[ble_log.h](ble_log.h.md)**: Defines macros for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) logging and hexdumping in the Pebble firmware.
- **[gap_le.c](gap_le.c.md)**: Initializes and deinitializes Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) components for connection, scanning, and advertising.
- **[gap_le.h](gap_le.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and deinitializing GAP LE in Bluetooth communication.
- **[gap_le_advert.c](gap_le_advert.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) advertisement scheduling for multiple payloads using a round-robin mechanism.
- **[gap_le_advert.h](gap_le_advert.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth Low Energy advertising jobs, including scheduling, unscheduling, and handling connection states.
- **[gap_le_connect.c](gap_le_connect.c.md)**: Manages BLE connections as a master or slave, handling connection intents, events, and whitelisting.
- **[gap_le_connect.h](gap_le_connect.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) connections, including connection intents and handling bonding changes.
- **[gap_le_connect_params.c](gap_le_connect_params.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) connection parameters, including handling parameter updates and workarounds for iOS-specific issues.
- **[gap_le_connect_params.h](gap_le_connect_params.h.md)**: Defines structures and a function to request connection parameters for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) communication.
- **[gap_le_connection.c](gap_le_connection.c.md)**: Manages connection-related state for GAP and GATT, including connection registration and cleanup.
- **[gap_le_connection.h](gap_le_connection.h.md)**: Header file for managing GAP LE connections, including connection handling, discovery, and parameter updates.
- **[gap_le_device_name.c](gap_le_device_name.c.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth Low Energy device names, including retrieval and storage operations.
- **[gap_le_device_name.h](gap_le_device_name.h.md)**: Functions to request and cache the device name for BLE connections.
- **[gap_le_scan.c](gap_le_scan.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) scanning functionality with report handling and state management.
- **[gap_le_scan.h](gap_le_scan.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) scanning, including starting, stopping, and handling scan results.
- **[gap_le_slave_discovery.c](gap_le_slave_discovery.c.md)**: Handles scheduling and management of Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) discovery advertisements for a device.
- **[gap_le_slave_discovery.h](gap_le_slave_discovery.h.md)**: Functions for managing BLE device discovery, including initialization and discoverability settings.
- **[gap_le_slave_reconnect.c](gap_le_slave_reconnect.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) reconnection advertising for Pebble devices, including HRM support.
- **[gap_le_slave_reconnect.h](gap_le_slave_reconnect.h.md)**: Handlers for starting and stopping BLE reconnection advertising for bonded master devices.
- **[gap_le_task.c](gap_le_task.c.md)**: Defines a function to map GAPLEClient types to PebbleTaskBitset values.
- **[gap_le_task.h](gap_le_task.h.md)**: Defines GAPLEClient enum and a function to convert it to PebbleTaskBitset.
- **[gatt.c](gatt.c.md)**: Handles GATT connection, disconnection, MTU updates, notifications, and indications for BLE.
- **[gatt_client_accessors.c](gatt_client_accessors.c.md)**: Functions and helpers for managing and accessing GATT client services, characteristics, and descriptors in BLE connections.
- **[gatt_client_accessors.h](gatt_client_accessors.h.md)**: Functions for accessing discovered GATT services, characteristics, and descriptors in BLE devices.
- **[gatt_client_discovery.c](gatt_client_discovery.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth GATT client service discovery, including job management and event dispatching.
- **[gatt_client_discovery.h](gatt_client_discovery.h.md)**: Header file for starting the discovery of GATT services, characteristics, and descriptors on a device.
- **[gatt_client_operations.c](gatt_client_operations.c.md)**: Implements GATT client operations for reading and writing characteristics and descriptors in BLE communication.
- **[gatt_client_operations.h](gatt_client_operations.h.md)**: Adapter code between Bluetopia's GATT APIs and Pebble's GATT/API for BLE operations.
- **[gatt_client_subscriptions.c](gatt_client_subscriptions.c.md)**: Manages GATT client subscriptions, including handling notifications, subscription events, and cleanup operations.
- **[gatt_client_subscriptions.h](gatt_client_subscriptions.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing GATT client subscriptions and notifications in BLE connections.
- **[gatt_service_changed.c](gatt_service_changed.c.md)**: Handles the GATT "Service Changed" characteristic for both client and server roles in Bluetooth communication.
- **[gatt_service_changed.h](gatt_service_changed.h.md)**: Implements the "Service Changed" characteristic for GATT, handling both client and server roles.
- **[pebble_bt.c](pebble_bt.c.md)**: Expands a UUID using a base UUID and a 32-bit value for Pebble Bluetooth communication.
